title: SourJoy Royal Bake
description: A fluffy and indulgent Italian dish featuring Jersey Royal potatoes baked to perfection with a dash-friendly sour twist.
instructions: Peel and dice the Jersey Royal Potatoes into small chunks.
Mix the All-Purpose Flour, Vegetable Oil, Butter, Sugar, Cornstarch, Vanilla Extract, Sour Cream, Lemon Juice, Salt, and Ground Cinnamon in a bowl until well combined.
Add the potato pieces to the mixture and toss gently to coat evenly.
Transfer the coated potatoes onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or non-stick spray.
Sprinkle fresh mint leaves over the top of the baked dish for an added freshness.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy on the edges.
Enjoy your indulgent and fluffy SourJoy Royal Bake!
